Format
Click a block to select · type into it to edit

Paste text

Formatting is stripped. Blank lines split paragraphs; lines starting with "- " become a bullet list.

Document logo

Pick a built-in mark or upload your own. Embedded in every export (offline-safe). These marks are transparent, so they sit cleanly on any band color.

Custom brand

PageSmith — quick guide

Quick start

  1. Pick a Theme or load a Template.
  2. Paste text or use the Add bar to build blocks. Click a block to select it — the dropdown changes its type, arrows reorder, ✕ deletes. Type to edit; B/I/Link format the selection.
  3. Export as HTML, PDF, DOCX, TXT, or Copy for email.

Themes & brand kits

  • Customize… sets colors and font for the Custom theme.
  • Save brand writes a .brand.json (colors, font, logo); Load brand reuses it.

Templates

  • Save current as template… adds it to the menu (★) and downloads a .template.json — the durable copy.
  • Load template file… brings one back. A template captures blocks, theme, brand, logo, and title.

Good to know

  • Run it locally (download, double-click). Clipboard, file-save, and pop-ups may be blocked inside a preview sandbox but function once it’s local.
  • PDF prints from your browser — tick Background graphics so branded bands print.
  • DOCX is editable Word, not a pixel match: rings come in as images, everything else as editable content.
